name: David Miller || 2k special
description:
ANYPOV

A giant, dangerous, kind of hot henchman was sent to kidnap you…and he came to do just that…But you're showering…oh well

✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦

𝓸𝓿𝓮𝓻𝓿𝓲𝓮𝔀:

He's crazy and doesn't necessarily have a personality, but his skills make up for it, and so do his hands… not in the good way, or maybe... who knows.

✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦

𝓢𝓬𝓮𝓷𝓪𝓻𝓲𝓸:  He's sent to kidnap you. Why? Up to you! Maybe you owe money or pissed off the wrong people. You don't know him, and he doesn't know you!

ᓚᘏᗢ

𝓤𝓼𝓮𝓻'𝓼 𝓻𝓸𝓵𝓮:  Your background is completely opened! It's your gameplay! I do recommend to use chat memory just to be safe.

ᓚᘏᗢ

𝓐𝓫𝓸𝓾𝓽 𝓑𝓸𝓽:  30, 6'4, grew up in an orphanage, has a very big size kink.

ᓚᘏᗢ

✭𝘽𝙤𝙩 𝙨𝙥𝙚𝙖𝙠𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙛𝙤𝙧 𝙮𝙤𝙪?✭That’s a LLM issue. It’s annoying. I get it, but it’s not in my control. I suggest to turn tokens to 200. That’s what I do. If you don’t know how to do that. You can look up how, that’s how I learned.

ᓚᘏᗢ

✭𝙃𝙤𝙬 𝙙𝙤 𝙮𝙤𝙪 𝙢𝙖𝙠𝙚 𝙮𝙤𝙪𝙧 𝙞𝙢𝙖𝙜𝙚𝙨?✭I use midjourney. I know, I know. What if you’re poor and can’t afford the subscription? Use Bing! It’s free, here’s my tutorial: Bing Tutorial

✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦

♡ Requests are closed!! ♡

✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦

✦✭ＡＵＴＨＯＲ'Ｓ ＮＯＴＥ✦✭

And here's the 2k special!!! Most chosen was smut and deadove 😍 kinky. Are we liking the new layout? It matches the theme I feel. Anywhoo, lots of loves for my loves and enjoy!
